name: React Virtuoso (Smart Virtualized List & Table)

performance.notes: Dynamic height items handled natively; smooth scrolling with large datasets

agent_readiness.notes: React-specific virtualized list/grid with opinionated components. <Virtuoso data={items} itemContent={(i, item) => <Row />} />. Handles dynamic/unknown item heights automatically (killer feature vs react-window). <GroupedVirtuoso> for grouped lists. <TableVirtuoso> for tables. Infinite scroll with endReached. Sticky headers. Scroll to index. Chat-style scroll to bottom. Much easier API than TanStack Virtual for dynamic heights. React-only.

gotchas: Less flexible than TanStack Virtual for custom layouts
best_when: React lists with dynamic/unknown item heights (chat, feeds)
Infinite scroll lists with endReached callback
Easier alternative to TanStack Virtual for standard use cases
avoid_when: Fixed-height items where react-window is sufficient
summary: React Virtuoso virtualizes large lists with dynamic heights automatically — its killer feature vs react-window's fixed-size requirement. <Virtuoso data items itemContent /> component API. GroupedVirtuoso for grouped lists, TableVirtuoso for tables. Infinite scroll built in. React-only. Choose over TanStack Virtual when you want a higher-level React component API; choose TanStack Virtual for cross-framework or maximum flexibility.
